rounds.title: Round 1: Technical Screening / Fundamentals (Strong Hire)
rounds.description: The candidate demonstrated strong technical fundamentals, solid understanding of core concepts, and the ability to reason through problems clearly.

rounds.title: Round 2: Coding / Problem-Solving Round (Strong Hire)
rounds.description: Excellent problem-solving skills with clean, optimized, and structured code. Demonstrated good understanding of algorithms, data structures, and debugging.

rounds.title: Round 3: System Design / Architecture (Strong Hire)
rounds.description: The candidate showed strong system design capability, demonstrating clarity in scaling, architecture, APIs, data flow, performance, and reliability.
